# Pride Map 2026

Interactive map and calendar of LGBTQ+ Pride parades across Europe in 2026.
Available at https://lavender-lobster-412344.hostingersite.com/

## What this site does

Pride Map 2026 shows 600+ Pride parade events across Europe on an interactive MapLibre map.
Events are colour-coded by how many days until they take place.
Users can filter by country, event size (small / medium / large relative to European prides),
and time frame (upcoming, this weekend, next weekend, past, all).
A list view with full-text search (including umlaut folding: u finds ü, s finds ß) is also available.
The site supports English and German.

## Data

Each event has: city, country, date, size category, region (subnational entity in local language),
website, Instagram, first year the event was held, ILGA-Europe rainbow index score for the country,
and attendance figures where known (with source: authorities or organizers).

Countries covered include DE, AT, CH, FR, IT, GB, ES, NL, BE, SE, NO, DK, FI, PL, CZ, HU,
and many more across Europe.

## Data sources

- Event dates and details: manually researched from official event websites and local media
- Attendance: from official sources (police/authorities) or organizer announcements
- ILGA-Europe Rainbow Index scores: https://rainboweurope.ilga-europe.org/

## Technology

Vite + React 18, MapLibre GL JS, deployed to Hostinger and GitHub Pages.
No user tracking for visitors with Do Not Track enabled.
Privacy-respecting analytics via GoatCounter.

## Contact / corrections

Missing a parade or found an error? Use the suggestion form linked in the app sidebar.
